//: Per-game dashboard config. Copy to `dashboard.config.json` (project root) and edit ONLY the keys you need to override for a different TOPSIM game/company. Every key is optional — anything omitted auto-detects (sheets by column shape) or falls back (headline/market lists). Delete this comment block in the real file (JSON has no comments; the `//` keys are ignored by the loader but keep the file valid).
//executiveSheetHint: Case-insensitive substring of the per-period KPI sheet (your company, periods as columns). If it doesn't match, the sheet is found structurally (the one with 'Periode N' column headers). GM default:
//marketSheetHint: Substring of the competitor sheet (rivals as columns). Falls back to the sheet that has company columns. GM default:
//companyPattern: Regex (source) for a competitor column header. Change if a game labels teams differently than U1/U2.
//aggregatePattern: Regex for the average/sum column header in the market sheet.
//headlineKpis: Substrings matched against KPI labels → the headline cards (in this order). No match → first 8 KPIs. Set this to the new game's north-star + key KPIs.
//marketChartMetrics: Market metrics that get an own-vs-rival line chart. No match → first 6 present.
//plannedKpi / actualKpi: Labels for the Plan-vs-Ist cross-check. Skipped silently if not found in the new game.
